completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created planning and state scaffolding from existing spec/design. No implementation, runtime tests, artifact lint, validation, or certification executed.

Added inline UI Wireframes and User Flows sections to spec.md for connector health, QF packet rendering, evidence bundle export, Telegram summary, action boundary, and schema-mismatch scenarios. No runtime code or certification fields changed.

Reconciled design.md with UX wireframes and user flows for connector status, packet search/digest/detail cards, PersonalEvidenceBundle builder, Telegram summary, schema mismatch, action boundary, accessibility/responsive behavior, authorization, and scenario-to-test mapping. No runtime source code, scopes, report, uservalidation, or certification fields changed.

No runtime source, scopes, report, uservalidation, docs, or certification fields changed.

Cross-repo design reconciliation pass against quantitativeFinance/specs/063-smackerel-companion-bridge/design.md. Added target_context (required) and source_refs (optional) to PersonalEvidenceBundle Bundle Fields table; added analysis_note -> qf/decision-packet+subtype mapping to content-type table; added explicit Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection naming QFApprovalAction and QFWatchSignal with pre-MVP handling rules. Added Reconciliation Notes (2026-05-03) section. No spec, scopes, report, uservalidation, runtime source, or certification fields modified.

Plan reconciliation pass (mode: reconcile) folding the 2026-05-03 cross-repo design deltas into scopes.md only. Scope 2 makes the response-level next_cursor canonical (persisted in sync_state.sync_cursor), demotes per-event QFDecisionEvent.cursor to diagnostic-only, and binds QF decision_type to Smackerel content type per the Decision Type To Smackerel Content Type Mapping table (analysis_note preserved as qf/decision-packet + Metadata.decision_subtype). Scope 4 tightens the PersonalEvidenceBundle required field set, marks source_refs optional, and adds field-set parity with QF spec 063 import validation. Scope 5 adds explicit reserved-schema handling per the design's Reserved Schemas (Not Implemented Pre-MVP) subsection (QFApprovalAction normalized as qf/approval-request diagnostic-only with Metadata.reserved=true; QFWatchSignal recorded as diagnostic log only). All scope statuses remain Not Started; no runtime source, spec, design, or uservalidation fields changed; no certification claim made.

Final plan review pass after the prior reconciliation. Tightened scopes.md evidence-bundle shorthand in Validation Checkpoints, Scope 1 DTO contract, Scope 4 scenarios, Scope 4 test titles, and Scope 4 DoD so the canonical PersonalEvidenceBundle required fields, optional source_refs semantics, and source_artifact_ids terminology are consistent throughout planning. No scope status, DoD checkbox, runtime source, spec, design, uservalidation, or certification field changed.

concerns.sourceDodItem: 4 G028 implementation-reality-scan FAKE_INTEGRATION hits: `internal/connector/qfdecisions/capability.go:109` (`return nil` from validator) and `internal/connector/qfdecisions/normalizer.go:58/91/102` (`return nil, &DegradedDiagnostic{...}` tuple)
concerns.followUpAction: The `implementation-reality-scan.sh` FAKE_INTEGRATION rule fires when a file's path matches `connector|client|adapter` AND the file contains zero external-call patterns AND the file contains suspicious patterns including `return nil`, `noop`, `mock`, `fake`. This produces false positives for pure business-logic helpers inside a connector package (the actual HTTP transport lives in sibling `client.go` and orchestration in `connector.go`). Recommendation: refine the scan to consider package boundary when checking external-call presence, OR exclude `return nil` from suspicious patterns when the function signature returns an error-shaped tuple. Per `.github/copilot-instructions.md` framework-file-immutability policy, this repo does NOT modify `.github/bubbles/scripts/` directly — fix must land upstream in the bubbles repository and be re-installed via `install.sh`.
concerns.rationale: This concern was added by the 2026-05-17 bubbles.harden audit pass after manual triage of all 4 hits confirmed they are pre-existing scan false positives, NOT spec-041 source-code defects. The connector source remains unchanged; no silencing edit was applied to satisfy the scan. The scan should remain a hard governance gate for fabricated integrations; only the rule's path-vs-pattern logic needs refinement to avoid these specific false positives.

notes: Scope 1 is partially certified and remains the only active executable planning section after the 2026-05-07 repair. Scope 2+ is parked on QF 063 Scope 2 read/outbox readiness. Overall feature remains in_progress; no final feature completion is claimed.
